headline: Reassessing Workday (WDAY) Valuation After A Prolonged Share Price Slide
summary: Why Workday Stock Is Drawing Attention Now Workday (WDAY) is back on many investors’ screens after a prolonged share price slide, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month, past 3 months, year to date, and over the past year. See our latest analysis for Workday. The recent 1 day share price return of 1.72% decline and 7 day share price return of 3.95% decline sit within a much sharper 90 day share price return of 41.40% decline, and the 1 year total shareholder return of...

headline: Why Is Workday (WDAY) Down 4.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Workday (WDAY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Workday Announces Date of Annual Stockholder Meeting on June 16, 2026
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, today announced that its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders will be held virtually on Tuesday, June 16, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Pacific Time / 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time.
